# Golfline (GL International) — Premium Flat-Knit Knitwear Manufacturer

> Golfline, a unit of GL International, is a vertically integrated flat-knit knitwear manufacturer based in Ludhiana, Punjab, India, with over 35 years of production expertise. We specialize in premium sweaters, pullovers, jacquard knits, cable knits, rib knits, and flat-knit collars for B2B clients — both domestic Indian brands and international labels.

## What We Do

- Full-cycle flat-knit knitwear manufacturing — design, sampling, knitting, linking, washing, finishing, pressing, packing, and dispatch
- Private label sweater and pullover manufacturing
- Knitwear design & development from tech packs, reference images, or existing garments
- 10-day sample development with revision rounds
- Production timelines: 4–6 weeks after order confirmation
- Zero subcontracting — every process happens in-house under one roof

## Machinery

- Stoll flat-knit machines (Germany)
- Shima Seiki flat-knit machines (Japan)
- Capable of all gauges, intricate jacquards, all knit structures

## Yarn & Fibre Expertise

Lambswool, cotton, cotton blends, acrylic, acrylic/wool blends, mohair blends

## Location

Ludhiana, Punjab, India (the knitwear manufacturing hub of India)

## Contact

- Website: https://golfline.in
- Email: team@golfline.in
- Phone: +91-9872858280
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/919872858280

## Key Differentiators

- 35+ years focused exclusively on flat-knit knitwear
- 100% in-house production with zero subcontracting
- 10-day sample development turnaround
- Multi-stage in-line quality control from yarn inspection to final pressing
- Trusted by brands including Chapter 2, Superkicks, BLCKORCHID, Freeze Studios, CRAY, Galli, EVEMEN, Farak, and others

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is Golfline's MOQ?
A: Flexible MOQs based on style, yarn, and complexity. We work with both growing brands and established labels.

Q: Do I need a tech pack to start?
A: No. A reference image, an existing garment, or a detailed idea is enough. We develop the technicals during sampling.

Q: How long does the full process take?
A: 8–12 weeks for a new style. Sampling: 2–3 weeks, production: 4–6 weeks. Repeat orders move faster.

Q: Can you replicate an existing garment?
A: Yes. We reverse-engineer garments — analyse construction, gauge, yarn, and fit to recreate closely.
